title: Doctor human-readable output reports unknown project targets
description: Black-box smoke for `orca doctor --cwd <dir>` when the target directory has no detectable project files.
input: Create an empty temporary target directory, run `orca doctor --cwd <dir>`, and verify the human-readable output reports the unknown project type and target cwd.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); TMP_PROJECT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_HOME $TMP_PROJECT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_HOME/.orca"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.orca" ORCA_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/orca.js doctor --cwd "$TMP_PROJECT"'
